title: Kickoff agent issue creates are local-only — need automatic sync to hub
description: Issues created by kickoff agents in worktrees (via crosslink quick/create) are written to the worktree's local issues.db but never synced back to the hub branch. The kickoff prompt (kickoff.rs:837) claims the db is shared via crosslink/hub, but in practice init_worktree_agent() creates a fresh db (via crosslink init --force) and sync only hydrates FROM the hub. Agent writes don't flow back because git push is blocked. Fix: kickoff agents should automatically sync their issue mutations to the hub branch, either via crosslink sync at regular intervals or by writing directly to issue files on the hub branch.
